title: Japanese Hazelnut Shishito Skewers
description: A fusion of Japanese flavors with Kenyan spices, featuring crispy hazelnut crust on tender shishito peppers.

ingredients.name: Kenyan Spices
ingredients.notes: mix of coriander, cumin, and turmeric

instructions: In a bowl, whisk together soy sauce, maple syrup, rice vinegar, and sesame oil.
Add chopped hazelnuts and Kenyan spices to the bowl and mix well.
Thread shishito peppers onto skewers, leaving space between each pepper.
Brush the skewers with the hazelnut-soy sauce mixture.
Grill the skewers for 3-4 minutes per side, or until the peppers are tender and slightly charred.
Optional: Serve with additional hazelnuts and soy sauce for dipping.
